user.title: Tesvor X500
user.description: Map and state are read from the MQTT topics published by the ESPHome firmware. Controls are forwarded to the firmware's existing ESPHome button/select entities, so no firmware change is needed.

data.name: Name
data.esphome_prefix: ESPHome entity prefix (device name slug, e.g. robiroboter)

abort.already_configured: This topic prefix is already configured.
